series_metadata.series_title: Copies of identification provided by electors
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of identification provided by electors with a voter registration form or absentee ballot application

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for the longer of these periods; 6 months from the date of receipt or 45 days from the date of the election for which the absentee ballot was issued, then destroy, Paper: Recycle
